mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select e.*, t.name teamName, r.name roleName from emp e left join team t on e.team_id = t.id left join role r on e.role_id = r.id where e.id = #{id}
select e.*, t.name teamName, r.name roleName from emp e left join team t on e.team_id = t.id left join role r on e.role_id = r.id
